title: centaurea acmophylla
intro: Centaurea acmophylla, also known as mountain centaury, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the aster family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea acmophylla include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Centaurea acmophylla can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder for its medicinal uses.
